1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get buildings in that kommunenummer with geometry and id

3.description: get 200-year stormflo polygons (stormflo200ar_klimaarna) to be reduced by the municipality extent

4.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced stormflo polygons

5.description: count distinct buildings that intersect stormflo

args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer,
       ST_XMin(ST_Extent(omrade))::double precision AS xmin,
       ST_YMin(ST_Extent(omrade))::double precision ASymin,
       ST_XMax(ST_Extent(omrade))::double precision AS xmax,
       ST_YMax(ST_Extent(omrade))::double precision AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%'
GROUP BY kommunenummer;
